title: Omukutu gwa IATF
summary: Ekifo ky'abantu bonna ekya International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF yali yeetaaga ekifo ekinywevu eky'abantu bonna ekiyinza okunnyonnyola eky'okulabirako, okuwa olukalala lwa pulojekiti, n'okulaga abawagizi ekkubo ettuufu ery'okutambuliramu.
why: Ekifo kino y'omulyango gw'olukale ogwa IATF. Kyakolebwa nga pulojekiti entonotono esobola okusomebwa, okuvvuunulwa, n'okukuumibwa mu lujjudde.
scopeIn: Empapula z'okutuuka mu lujjudde ezinnyonnyola enkola ya IATF
Ekiwandiiko eky'olukale eky'ebivvulu bya IATF ebyakkirizibwa, ebikolebwa, n'okuteekebwa mu buwandiike n'embeera, omukuumi, ekifo eky'okuterekamu n'okulaga
Okusaasaanya okw'omulembe ku Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Ebifo by'abammemba eby'obwannannyini, akawunti, oba entambula y'okuyingira
Okwaniriza code source ya pulojekiti, esangibwa mu buwandiike bwa polojekiti buli emu
Empuliziganya mu budde obwa nnamaddala, esangibwa mu Discord
Okugoberera ensonga za pulojekiti ez'enjawulo, ezibeera mu ggwanika lya GitHub lya buli pulojekthi

title: Selfie eya IATF
summary: Enkola ya IATF eyasooka, eyateekebwa mu buwandiike oluvannyuma lw'okutuuka ku nkomerero yaayo.
problem: Okukebera mu ntandikwa ekyuma ekyesigamiziddwa ku buyambi wansi w'ekitebe kya IATF.
why: Ekiwandiiko kyekuumibwa mu lujjudde ng'ebiwandiiko by'omulimu, newankubadde ng'okukulaakulana okw'amaanyi kuweddewo.
scopeIn: Ekyokulabirako ekisooka eky'ekintu eky'omugaso ekiteekeddwa mu buwandiike mu lujjudde

title: Enkola ya IATF
summary: Ekitongole kya IATF eky'obwannakyewa, ekikuumibwa oluvannyuma lw'okutuuka ku nkomerero y'obutonde.
why: Ekiwandiiko kyekuumibwa mu lujjudde ng'ebiwandiiko by'omulimu, newankubadde ng'okukulaakulana okw'amaanyi kuweddewo.
scopeIn: Okwonoona okw'omu butonde okwetooloola IATF community channels, okukuumibwa ng'ekiwandiiko eky'olukale
